inputs.prompt: Project: The Keeper — a narrative feature thriller about a whistleblower inside a pharmaceutical company. Format: 105 min. Budget: €3.8M. Seeking: €600,000 equity. Revenue model: theatrical + streaming + broadcast. Comparables: The Report, Official Secrets. Director: previous feature acquired by Amazon. Presale: One Nordic broadcaster confirmed at €350K. Tax credits: Irish Section 481 (32%).
Project: documentary about street food vendors. Format: Feature doc, 85 min. Budget: €800,000. Seeking: €200,000. Revenue: festivals and streaming.

Project: The Crossing — a multilingual European drama about three families at a disputed border checkpoint. Format: 6-part series. Budget: €12M. Seeking: €2M from private investors. Revenue: multi-territory broadcast + streaming licensing. Co-production: Germany, Poland, Czech Republic. Eurimages support confirmed. German DFFF tax credit applicable.
